'''chathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irrecoverably|irrecoverably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irrecoverably|irrecoverably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chathate|chathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chathatesher|chathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathatesherĂ«m|chathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chathatero|chathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chathateshĂ«|chathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathateshĂ«m|chathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichathatero|gokichathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichathateshĂ«|gokichathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathateshĂ«m|gokichathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochathankerom|gochathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochathankeshĂ«|gochathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochathankeshĂ«m|gochathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochathankeya|gochathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chathaterom|chathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathatemu|chathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chathateya|chathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichathaterom|gokichathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathatemu|gokichathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichathateya|gokichathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chathathate|chathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chathathatesher|chathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathathatesherĂ«m|chathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chathathatero|chathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chathathateshĂ«|chathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathathateshĂ«m|chathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichathathatero|gokichathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichathathateshĂ«|gokichathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathathateshĂ«m|gokichathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochathathankerom|gochathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochathathankeshĂ«|gochathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochathathankeshĂ«m|gochathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochathathankeya|gochathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chathathaterom|chathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathathatemu|chathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chathathateya|chathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichathathaterom|gokichathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathathatemu|gokichathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichathathateya|gokichathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠte|chĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠtesher|chĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠtero|chĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠthĂŠtero|gokichĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠterom|chĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠtemu|chĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠthĂŠteya|chĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠthĂŠterom|gokichĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠthĂŠteya|gokichĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafthafte|chafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafthaftesher|chafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafthaftesherĂ«m|chafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafthaftero|chafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafthafteshĂ«|chafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafthafteshĂ«m|chafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafthaftero|gokichafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafthafteshĂ«|gokichafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafthafteshĂ«m|gokichafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafthafnkerom|gochafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafthafnkeshĂ«|gochafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafthafnkeshĂ«m|gochafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafthafnkeya|gochafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafthafterom|chafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafthaftemu|chafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafthafteya|chafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafthafterom|gokichafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafthaftemu|gokichafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafthafteya|gokichafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
